data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Secure user authentication system with options for single sign-on.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 and two-factor authentication are available.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption is utilized for data protection both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and encryption at rest with AES-256.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS)
data.description: Monitors network traffic for potential threats or anomalies.
data.technical_spec: Custom IDS solutions integrated with cloud services.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine audits to identify vulnerabilities and improve security posture.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party audits performed on a regular basis.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Comprehensive strategy in place for managing and mitigating security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Defines roles, communication plans, and recovery steps.
